title: phyllanthus subcarnosus
intro: Phyllanthus subcarnosus, also known as stone breaker or chanca piedra, is a plant species native to the Amazon rainforest, belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating kidney stones and gallstones due to its ability to break down and dissolve these formations. The health benefits of Phyllanthus subcarnosus include reducing inflammation, improving liver function, and supporting the overall digestive system. Herbal preparations of Phyllanthus subcarnosus typically involve tea infusions, tinctures, or capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
